app.title: ElevenLabs API Diagnostics
app.tagline: Diagnose, analyze, and remediate ElevenLabs API errors

auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please check your details and try again.

input.heading: What's going wrong?
input.subheading: Paste an error log, describe the issue, or upload a screenshot.
input.textPlaceholder: Paste an error message, log line, or describe what the client is experiencing...
input.imageHint: Tap to upload, or drag and drop. Up to 3 images.
input.validationEmpty: Add some text or at least one screenshot before diagnosing.
input.errorTooLarge: That upload is too large. Try fewer or smaller images.
input.errorTooManyImages: You can upload up to 3 images at a time.
input.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while diagnosing this. Please try again.
input.apiKeyRequired: Add your Anthropic API key (top right) before running a diagnosis.

result.idleBody: Fill in the details on the left and click Diagnose to get started.

demo.landingSubtitle: Pick an API to demo live for a client or prospect.
demo.apiKeyRequired: Add your ElevenLabs API key (top right) to run this demo.

textToSpeech.title: Text to Speech
textToSpeech.description: Turn written text into natural-sounding speech in any of dozens of voices.

speechToText.title: Speech to Text
speechToText.description: Transcribe recorded or uploaded audio into accurate text.

voices.title: Voices
voices.description: Browse the account's voice library and clone a new voice from a sample.

conversationalAi.title: Conversational AI
conversationalAi.description: Have a live, real-time spoken conversation with a voice agent.

dubbing.title: Dubbing
dubbing.description: Translate and dub a video or audio clip into another language.

soundEffects.title: Sound Effects
soundEffects.description: Generate a short sound effect from a text description.

demoSoundEffects.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Footsteps on gravel, a door creaking open...
demoSoundEffects.validationEmpty: Describe the sound effect you want to generate.
demoSoundEffects.errorGeneric: Something went wrong generating that sound effect. Please try again.

demoVoices.errorLoadingVoices: Couldn't load the voice library. Check the API key and try again.
demoVoices.noVoices: No voices found in this account.
demoVoices.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. Allow microphone access, or upload a file instead.
demoVoices.cloneError: Something went wrong cloning that voice. Please try again.
demoVoices.validationSample: Record or upload a voice sample first.

demoSpeechToText.heading: Record or upload audio
demoSpeechToText.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. Allow microphone access, or upload a file instead.
demoSpeechToText.validationSample: Record or upload a clip first.
demoSpeechToText.errorGeneric: Something went wrong transcribing that clip. Please try again.

demoDubbing.validationFile: Choose a video or audio file first.
demoDubbing.errorGeneric: Something went wrong starting that dubbing job. Please try again.

demoTextToSpeech.errorLoadingVoices: Couldn't load the voice library. Check the API key and try again.
demoTextToSpeech.textPlaceholder: Type what you'd like the voice to say...
demoTextToSpeech.errorGeneric: Something went wrong generating that speech. Please try again.

demoConversationalAi.errorGeneric: Something went wrong starting that conversation. Check the agent ID and API key.

anthropic.title: Anthropic (used for Diagnose)
anthropic.help: Stored only in this browser tab for your current session, and sent only to our diagnosis endpoint. It is never saved on our servers.
anthropic.getKeyLink: Get an API key from the Anthropic Console

elevenlabs.title: ElevenLabs (used for Demo)
elevenlabs.help: Stored only in this browser tab for your current session, and sent only to our demo endpoints. It is never saved on our servers.
elevenlabs.getKeyLink: Get an API key from the ElevenLabs dashboard
